response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:27: Intro talk. 2. 00:27-01:13: Identified song 'Choco-sensation' via performance. Searched for title, appears to be an original song by Yuzuki Choco. Transcribed lyrics as they weren't explicitly found. 3. 01:13-03:00: Talk. 4. 03:00-03:13: Short sung birthday greeting. 5. 03:13-05:03: Further talk and closing.
response.global_summary: The video shows a birthday celebration for the VTuber Yuzuki Choco, including a live vocal performance of her original song 'Choco-sensation'. She is joined by other VTubers Shirogane Noel and Yukihana Lamy.

scenes.description: The video starts with an intro scene inside a virtual stage setting. Yuzuki Choco walks onto the stage and waves.
Yuzuki Choco performs her song 'Choco-sensation' with choreography on the virtual stage.

ゆらぐ心をめぐる感情くすぐる
一度じゃあまいの？せーしょん
いやされたいあまえていたいとゆう
ちょこせんせーしょん
きみのしてん きみのたいおん
わかってても こいははかれない
げんきなのに ためいきしちゃう
もしかしててもておくれ？
でもどっちどっちするまでうごけないから
どきどきはこんで きてねまいしゅーでん
ちょこちょこ せーしょん れい！
ちょこちょこ せーしょん れい！
ちょこちょこ せーしょん れい！
ちょこちょこ せーしょん れい！
せったい きみも だめにしたい
ちょこちょこ せーしょん れい！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Emotions circling my wavering heart are tickling me.
Is once not enough? Sensation.
Want to be healed, want to be spoiled, a
Choco-sensation.
Your perspective, your body temperature,
even if I know them, love cannot be measured.
Even though I'm energetic, I find myself sighing,
could it be that it's already too late?
But I can't move until I decide one way or the other,
so please bring the excitement, every train ride.
Choco-choco-sensation, Yay!
Choco-choco-sensation, Yay!
Choco-choco-sensation, Yay!
Choco-choco-sensation, Yay!
I definitely want to spoil you too.
Choco-choco-sensation, Yay!

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco talks to the audience about her birthday event.
Yuzuki Choco is joined by Shirogane Noel and Yukihana Lamy on stage, and they sing a short birthday greeting together.
scenes.performer_in_video: Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, Yukihana Lamy
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: おめでとう！ちょこ先生！

scenes.description: The performers have a conversation and introduce themselves.
The performers conclude the segment in a virtual room.
